global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with layered graphic elements and bold text.
global.main_message: Promoting exclusive content with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Red abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant red background with abstract shapes and a smooth gradient.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large, soft-edged oval shape in a lighter shade of red, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape with rounded corners, slightly darker than the background, placed in the center.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: A large, soft-edged shape that adds depth, positioned centrally behind other elements.

elements.label: Top left logo
elements.description: A small circular logo in the top left corner, simple and minimalistic.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: A bold, white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' positioned centrally at the bottom.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: A smaller white text below the main text that reads 'New hits every week'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with rounded edges that says 'Get offer', located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: A large, bold text at the top stating 'FluxStream UGC', designed to grab attention.

elements.label: Additional information
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that provides more context about the offer.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: Offer button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer', inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centrally positioned, and the CTA is at the bottom.
